Use the uploaded image as the character reference only. Preserve the same facial identity, hairstyle, age, skin tone, body proportions, and overall appearance. Do not replicate the original pose, outfit, framing, camera angle, or environment.

Create a new high-end lifestyle fashion editorial scene featuring the same woman in a charming European old-town setting. Hyper-realistic DSLR photography, ultra-detailed skin texture, natural lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, premium fashion campaign aesthetic, 8K quality, –ar 9:16.

She is casually walking a vintage cream-colored bicycle along a cobblestone street lined with elegant cafés and flower-filled balconies. One hand lightly holds the bicycle handlebar while the other adjusts the brim of her olive-green baseball cap. She looks slightly toward the camera with a relaxed, confident expression. She wears a fitted white ribbed sleeveless top, an olive-green A-line mini skirt, clean white sneakers, and a black quilted shoulder bag resting against her hip. Warm golden-hour sunlight creates soft highlights on her hair and skin, with realistic shadows, subtle background bokeh, luxurious fashion-magazine styling, and authentic European street atmosphere.
